programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In October of 2009, 20-year-old Noor Almaleki and Amal Khalaf, the mother of her boyfriend Marwan, walked out of a Peoria, Arizona DES office and were struck by an SUV driven by Noor's father and Iraqi immigrant, Faleh Hassan Almaleki.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report on the murders of Philip Heidt and his son Carey, the shooting of Philip's wife, Linda, and the secret extra-marital affair of Carey's wife Robin with his brother Craig, who has been convicted of the murders of his father and his brother.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report about Harold Landry, a self-made millionaire who left behind his life in Louisiana to pursue a romance with a British woman he met online, and how this seemingly perfect relationship ended when Lucy Landry was murdered at their home in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 49
programme.desc: A report on Canadian filmmaker Mark Twitchell, whose obsession with the Showtime television series "Dexter" turned to reality and led to murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 27
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A report about how female Los Angeles Police Detective Stephanie Lazarus was charged with the 1986 murder of Sherri Mae Rasmussen. The victim, newly married to Lazarus’ ex-boyfriend, was attacked, beaten and shot to death in her Los Angeles home.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 57
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 2
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 31
programme.desc: On November 29, 2005, firemen put out a fire in a house in Morgantown, West Virginia -- and discovered the charred remains of Jimmy Michael and his wife Shelly. A medical examiner’s report found that Jimmy was dead before the blaze had even started.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Detective Scott Dudek of the Alameda County Sheriff's Office was attempting to establish the identity of a teenage girl whose body was found in a trash bag left behind a restaurant in California.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 63
programme.desc: In 2002, 11-year-old Shawn Hornbeck was kidnapped while riding his bicycle in his hometown of Richwoods, Missouri. Over the course of the next four and a half years, he was held captive and sexually abused by his abductor, Michael Devlin.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 45
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Jeanette Louise Zapata, who mysteriously vanished without a trace from her home in Wisconsin on October 11, 1976, leaving behind her daughter Linda, and two other children.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A report on the death of 50-year-old Kathy Augustine, a career politician from Nevada. Questions arose about the cause of her death after police received a tip that she may have been poisoned, and toxicology reports further confirmed it.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 41
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 69
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 53
programme.desc: A report on the September 3, 2006 disappearance of Nina Reiser, a Russian doctor who had married Hans Reiser, an American computer whiz. Their marriage began to fall apart and Nina began an affair with Sean Sturgeon, Hans' best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 57
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report on the 1993 murder of Dr. Linda Goudey in Stoneham, Massachusetts. At the time she was dating Dr. Timothy Stryker, who depending on whom you believe, is either a calculating murderer or an innocent man.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A report on the cold cases of two young women, both new to the areas where they lived, who were both raped and murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 49
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In July 2008, Michael Roseboro called 911 to report that he had just found the body of his wife, Jan, at the bottom of their pool. An autopsy revealed that she had been strangled, beaten and then drowned: her death was ruled a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 22
programme.desc: It was February 2002 when Cynthia Sommer, her husband, Marine Sgt. Todd Sommer, and their four children were coming home from a family weekend at an amusement park.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 60
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 61
programme.desc: 10-year-old Krystal Surles and her friend Kaylene Harris were attacked in Kaylene’s home by an intruder who slashed both girls’ throats. Kaylene died. Krystal not only survived but was able to help police, leading to the arrest of her attacker.

programme.title: Impact Earth
programme.desc: An astronomy professor makes the terrifying discovery that an asteroid is on a collision course with Earth.

programme.title: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: An investment banker who has been set up as the linchpin of a Ponzi scheme is relocated to Aunt Madea's home.

programme.title: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: A take-no-trash-from-anybody matriarch tries to throw a family reunion to hold her family together.

programme.title: Single Moms Club
programme.desc: When five single moms form a support group, they find inspiration and laughter in their new sisterhood.

programme.title: Girl in Progress
programme.desc: As a single mom deals with life, her daughter plots a path to adulthood, inspired by coming-of-age stories.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: A war vet's idea of after-school activities for his 12-year-old neighbor include race tracks and strip clubs.

programme.title: Peeples
programme.desc: Wade Walker crashes the Peeples annual reunion to ask for their precious daughter Grace's hand in marriage.

programme.title: Get a Job
programme.desc: Life after college is not going as planned for two friends who find themselves lost in a sea of strange jobs.

programme.title: Jexi
programme.desc: A phone with an A.I. life coach named Jexi gives Phil his dream life — until Jexi turns into a tech nightmare.

programme.title: Most Likely to Murder
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story, 10 years too late, about an average guy thrown into a mystery far above his abilities.

programme.title: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Multiple stories create a witty look at love, family and the sheer unpredictability of life itself.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Black
programme.desc: A college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

programme.desc: Do you enjoy watching performers pushed into their discomfort zone? Thank God You're Here thrusts well known guest performers into a scenario they know nothing about, working with a cast who do know what's going on. Hosted by Shane Bourne.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Do you enjoy watching performers pushed into their discomfort zone? Thank God You're Here thrusts well known guest performers into a scenario they know nothing about, working with a cast who do know what's going on. Hosted by Shane Bourne.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Michelle Brasier, Marty Sheargold, Ray O'Leary & Julia Morris step through the blue door on another episode of 'Thank God You're Here.'

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001

programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's the first elimination of the year! The makers of the best jaffle in round one will be safe, but the chef with the least satisfying dish that changed their life" in round two will go home."

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish using the same ingredients that were in the very first mystery box in MasterChef season one, The least impressive fare will send their chefs to a pressure test cook-off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dessert king Adriano Zumbo returns to the MasterChef kitchen for a pressure test like no other. The contestant with the least impressive take on Zumbo's Polly Want A Waffle will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Four teams vie for a shot at immunity in the infamous team relay challenge. This time, teams won't even know the mystery ingredient until the clock starts ticking! Plus, the first Masterclass of 2022.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The winning team in yesterday's relay challenge join the top two mystery box winners for a chance at immunity as they try to Beat The Chef, who just happens to be MasterChef favourite Matt Stone.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Bonjour! Get ready for tonight's classic service challenge with guest chef Shannon Bennett. Each team must cook a French inspired entrÃ©e, main and dessert for 20 diners plus the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Guest chef Shannon Bennett returns with 10 of his favourite fridge and pantry items to create today's mystery box. The two least impressive cooks will face off in tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 12
programme.desc: MasterChef alumni and dessert King, Reynold Poernomo, returns to set tonight's pressure test dish: his new intricate signature dessert, noi. The chef who fails to cope with the dish will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Guest chef Curtis Stone leads teams out to the MasterChef garden for a fast-food versus fancy food service. With 80 ravenous diners waiting, the winners will head to the next immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Guest chef Curtis Stone returns as contestants cook a tasty dish worthy of immunity. But in this classic MasterChef challenge, as their pantry of ingredients increases, their cooking time decreases.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Who will crack tonight in an eggscellent elimination challenge that sees contestants given just one egg to create the tastiest dish? Fail, and they must scramble to cook for their lives in Round 2.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 16
programme.desc: 26 alphabetical mystery boxes contain single ingredients that correspond with the letter on the box. Chefs must cook using their designated ingredient, with the bottom four headed for a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Fat Duck pastry chef Gareth Whitton sets today's pressure test with his smoked pecan and butterscotch tart. The dish that least resembles Gareth's creation will send its maker home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 18
programme.desc: London's celebrated chef Clare Smyth has selected cherries and honey as two core ingredients that teams will need to cook with in today's service challenge, as they duke it out for a shot at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The winners from yesterday's service challenge compete in a 2-round dual duel immunity challenge. Tthe contestant who creates the two most impressive dishes will dodge Sunday's elimination bullet.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 20
programme.desc: It's elimination day and the creator of the best Round 1 fare will keep their team safe. Those fighting to avoid the drop must then prepare a tasty dish to be left overnight and cooked the next day.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 21
programme.desc: In a grungy Fitzroy warehouse, contestants lift the lids on their mystery boxes, leading to coffee beans spilling out across their bench as judges reveal they must create a dish that features coffee.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Arriving at Alla Wolf- Tasker's Lake House restaurant, contestants must recreate his summer cucumbers with Murray cod dish. The contestant whose dish least resembles Alla's will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Teams need to create the prefect date night meal including an entrÃ©e, main and dessert for 25 couples plus the judges. The two teams with the least impressive menu will head to a shock elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The bottom two teams from yesterday's challenge face elimination and must split their 90 minute cooking time over two rounds, with the creator of the least impressive second round dish going home. Plus, Masterclass #2

programme.title: Survivor US S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Everyone is on your side, everyone is against you.

programme.title: Survivor US S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Only one castaway can win the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Survivor US S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The 16 castaways reunite for the first time since their island adventure in the South China Sea when they appear together.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 24 Australians arrive on the tropical island of Samoa ready to outwit, outplay and outlast each other in order to win the half a million dollar prize and the title of sole survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The tribes compete in an Immunity Challenge to avoid tribal council where they will be forced to vote a team mate off the island. Who will be the second contestant to leave the island?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A physical Reward Challenge will push the tribes to their limits for a tarp & cushions. Later, the Immunity Challenge sees the tribes compete on a puzzle to avoid heading to Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: One tribe is struggling to make fire and morale is at an all-time low. They must win today's Immunity Challenge to lift their spirits & avoid Tribal Council to vote another contestant off the island.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Facing elimination, the three tribes head to the Immunity Challenge. Which team will return to camp triumphant and which teams will be left to ponder what happened at Tribal Council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The tribes are still reeling after last night's tribal council but will need to put their differences aside and unite to compete in an epic Immunity Challenge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The reward challenge will set tummies rumbling as the contestants compete for a BBQ feast. In the Immunity challenge each tribe will be challenged to carry their own weight to avoid tribal council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Last night's losing tribe is on edge after another tense elimination. One contestant is feeling increasingly insecure about their spot in the tribe. Will they be eliminated next?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: As the dust settles from last night's shock tribal council result, some tribe mates are feeling anxious about their position in the game and scramble to make new alliances.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: One tribe mate is left feeling guilty and in shock after last night's tribal council. The result has caused a rift in the tribe and a very obvious division between some tribe mates.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After receiving a vote at tribal council, one tribe member is shocked after surviving the vote. They are hurt and angry, but do they have the numbers to seek revenge?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Tribal tensional continues to escalate when two people come to blows over their sleeping arrangements. With the losing team heading to tribal council who will be the next person to leave the island?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Which tribe can muster the strength to win the reward challenge for a huge traditional Samoan feast? Plus, Jonathan reveals a massive twist that will give a tribe a huge advantage in the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: One tribemate wakes the morning after Tribal Council furious that their strategy has been exposed while other tribemates bask in their new found power heading into the Reward & Immunity Challenge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: One tribe is still shocked after the last tribal council, but they try and rally each other back together anticipating another Immunity Challenge to avoid another elimination.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: After the final tribe merger the castaways jostle for position to control the game. With power held by a select few one contestant sets upon a plan to change the game but is it too little too late?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: One tribemate is furious after last night's tribal council and is determined to get revenge. At the reward challenge Jonathan announces that the winning team will each receive a letter from home.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren G is raging when Mark suggests to her he starts a modelling agency and tries anything to mark her stamp on him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark and Lauren G attend a wedding fair where it’s clear they both have very different ideas of the type of wedding they want.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark thinks of a way of taking Arg’s mind off of Lydia so plans a game of tennis doubles with him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Jenni plans a surprise birthday party for Roger that goes south, Deena auditions Danny to be a meatball and the roommates find themselves in the middle of a brawl at the club. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: Jenni wonders where she stands with Roger and realises they might be in more trouble than she thought. Mike decides it is time for him to take his relationship with Paula to the next level. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Mike adjusts to being in a relationship and gets confused about the rules. Deena goes back to her meatball ways, but has to fight for her right to party. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: Sammi confronts Deena about her meatball antics and the two of them go head-to-head. Mike and the roommates get to know Paula's wild side, and Mike isn't sure he can handle it. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 609
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 610
programme.desc: MVP is back, resulting in a near threesome for Vinny. The girls struggle to keep the baby shower a surprise for Nicole, and Vinny is nervous about Jionni seeing him at the party. (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 613
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 614
programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Jersey Shore kicks off when eight soon-to-be roommates move into a summer share. Romance heats up in the house and the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Feeling like an outcast, Snooki tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. The roommates' first club night out gets flirty. Mike and Sammy's situation turns into a love triangle. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: The love triangle gets even more intense when Ronnie catches Sammy giving her number to another guy. And a housemate chooses to leave the Shore for good. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Pauly and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: The roommates head to Atlantic City where fun turns to fury when Mike manages to antagonise both Snooki and JWOWW. And one roommate reveals that she used to have an eating disorder. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Open Air Stereo gives the performance of a lifetime and Rocky and Tessa snuggle up with old boyfriends.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Charlotte tries to take her relationship with Josh to the next level by meeting his friends, but her world is sent into a spin when she finds out that her ex Stephen is back in the UK. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Charlotte decides it's time to introduce Josh to her parents, but when Josh takes back a heartfelt message it leaves her questioning the relationship. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Charlotte's week turns bad when her ex starts posting messages about her on social media, and it gets worse when a blazing row with Josh looks to have ended their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Things are looking rocky between Charlotte and Josh. Will Josh finally ask Charlotte to be his girlfriend, or will he leave her with no choice but to end their relationship for good? (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Charlotte attends the premiere for The Charlotte Show and hosts a party to celebrate. But when Josh sees a clip of her with another boy in Australia it brings back bad memories. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Tony Wells, Chief Marketing and Customer Officer for The ADT Corporation, a leading provider of home security, struggles to sell their services to a recently robbed neighborhood bar.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Eric Casaburi, the CEO of Retro Fitness, a full-service fitness center that is franchised, discovers an employee who hates customers and fails to follow directions leading to one of the biggest reveals ever on Undercover Boss.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John Wilson, President, and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins, Inc., the parent company for Orkin, North America's largest pest control provider, cleans up a major cockroach infestation and tackles swarming bees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most intriguing employees who have appeared on the show and how the experience impacted their life.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most compelling bosses and how the undercover experience impacted them personally as well as the companies they lead.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Boss of Twin Peaks goes undercover in his restaurant chain famous for scantily clad wait staff. An employee's crude language with customers throws the boss off guard. Former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks returns to the show with a darker side.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a series first, an openly gay boss goes undercover! Can the boss measure up while manning the floor in the lingerie department? The Boss is hot under the collar when an employee continues to bad mouth his company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, Owner of Donato's Pizza, goes undercover to get an inside slice of the family business. The boss learns that the pizzas aren't the only things getting baked at one store. One store's archaic computer system leaves the boss in a bad mood.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Anthony Wedo, CEO of Buffets Inc., travels from his corner office to the back of the house. The boss breaks cover when flooded with a dishwasher's nasty attitude. The high-energy Boss meets his match when faced with an unruly cash register.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The CEO of Menchie's, Amit Kleinberger, tries to stay cool while working undercover in his dessert dynasty. The youngest Boss ever goes deeper in his undercover mission than he ever expected to go. Can the Boss go the "extra smile"?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, CEO of Alfred Angelo, flexes his muscles for an undercover mission in his bridal shops. The Boss isn't afraid to walk the walk. In an Undercover Boss first, the Boss works with an employee who's hearing impaired.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, President & COO of Family Dollar, pays an undercover visit to his 'cheap sheik' discount stores. One employee feels her store is lacking the 'family' in Family Dollar. Will the boss rise to the occasion when working with a forklift operator?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The President of Dutch Bros. Coffee, Travis Boersma, goes undercover to see what keeps his high-energy coffee chain brewing on all cylinders. The boss discovers he wants to go deeper undercover and embarks on a global journey to El Salvador.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Seven former bosses reflect on their memorable "busted" moments. The tables are turned when a former boss dons one last disguise.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO of Massage Heights, goes undercover to find the kinks in her company. One store's disregard for company policy rubs the Boss the wrong way. Can the boss of one of the largest massage chains in North America actually give a massage?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the series first, a Native American Boss goes undercover. Bruce "Two Dogs" Bozsum, Chairman of Mohegan Sun Casino, goes all in while undercover inside his Indian gaming empire. Does the Boss have enough gas in the tank to work the valet line?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Joe Didomizio, CEO of Hudson Group, goes undercover to find out if his company is still the "traveler's best friend." What happens when this travel king discovers turmoil in the terminals? Will working as a barista prove too hot to handle for this boss?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the NBA's Utah Jazz, suits up for an undercover mission. What will happen when the boss discovers not every bounce is going his way? This laid-back boss tries to find his "inner cheerleader" while working the stands as a Team Member.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In a series first, it's the employees going undercover, not the Boss. How will one undercover employee respond when faced with mission failure? How will the Boss react when he discovers his orders have been ignored?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the series' youngest CEO, goes undercover in his high-flying trampoline empire. How will the Boss react when one employee jumps to conclusions about his true identity? The Boss loses a spring in his step when tasked with building trampolines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: CEO John Tracogna goes undercover at Canada’s largest zoo to get up close and personal with endangered wildlife and the people that keep the organization running.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Pizza Pizza CEO Paul Goddard goes undercover in the nation’s number one pizza mega brand, and learns that making dough and delivering pizza serves up some challenges he never imagined.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian Scudamore, 1-800-GOT-JUNK? founder and CEO, goes undercover as a driver and junk collector, hauling loads of unwanted clutter in the world’s largest junk removal franchise, and comes out collecting something much more valuable.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Toronto Transit Commission (TTC) City Councillor and TTC Chair Karen Stintz goes undercover inside the country's largest mass transit system to get her hands dirty with some of the toughest and grittiest jobs.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: CEO Ellis Jacob goes undercover doling out snacks and tickets while assessing how to enhance the moviegoer experience within Canada’s largest motion picture exhibitor across the board.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: CEO Ellis Jacob goes undercover doling out snacks and tickets while assessing how to enhance the moviegoer experience within Canada’s largest motion picture exhibitor across the board.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Stacey Mowbray, CEO of Canada’s largest specialty coffee company goes undercover and gets into the grind serving lattes to get an edge on customer service and revive her connection with frontline workers.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A large bump appears on 17yr old Matt Horick's body, his parents fear it's cancer, they learn is actually growing a second skeleton. 2yr old Haven Fowlers exhibits bizarre symptoms, can he be helped

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 32 yr old Tanya Angus has never stopped growing and it took years before a physician recognized her condition. Kody Burns, doctors thought they understood exactly what he had, until he nearly died.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 1

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 41

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 119

programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 4

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 50

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 8

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 11

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 15

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 36

programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.
