programme.desc: Julia faces off against an unwelcome house guest in the form of an inquisitive serpent. Meanwhile, the new member of the team, Bonny, goes to doggy boot camp.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Because of its isolated habitat, little is known about the Galapagos shark and its behaviors. And that’s enough to get Shark Gordon interested.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: An increase in sightings of the Bronze Whaler Shark around the coast of New Zealand appears to mean an increase in shark numbers. This trend is cause for concern for water users.

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five
programme.desc: Delve deep into the African waters and discover a new side of these prehistoric predators of the sea, while reconsidering the Hollywood portrayal which has done much to damage the reputation of these gentle creatures.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gary Brown's visit to an African chimp sanctuary becomes a deadly struggle when he and his guide are attacked by the colony's escaped alpha male. Idaho Zoo's 'Feast for the Beast' fundraiser takes a bloody turn when a 600-pound Siberian tiger breaks free.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The East Australian Grey Nurse is the only shark in the world that is critically endangered. More than 50% of the animals are carrying hooks and traces from fisherman's lines. Interaction with humans is endangering this animal.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Milli, Geo, and Bot are packing healthy snacks for a picnic with their friend, Anna. But just then the Umi Alarm sounds - it's Anna! Her lunchbox and flask are missing!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The Ghost Family Fancy Dress Party: It's Halloween in Umi City, and everyone's dressing up in great costumes - even a friendly little ghost! Milli, Geo and Bot have never met a ghost before.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are deep in the woods when they discover and befriend a mud-loving monster truck named Gasquatch. Now, they must set out on an epic adventure to bring their new friend to Mud Fest… the muddiest party of all time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In the kingdom of knight-trucks, Blaze discovers a machine his medieval pals use to recharge. But when a dragon snatches the charging station, Blaze leads a quest to recover the machine before everyone in the kingdom runs out of energy and falls asleep.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Zeta uses a Zahracorn suit to sneak her, Nazboo, and his family into the Zahracorn Parade, but the disguise goes haywire! Zeta grows jealous when Nazboo gets an enchanted robe that allows him to do magic.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: A stinky bug infestation in Zeta's secret lair forces her to spend the night at Shimmer and Shine's Palace. Zeta and Nazboo have to take care of Shimmer, Shine, and Leah when a potion mishap turns them into little babies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Kaz worries he's not brave enough, he adventures with the kids to find a Bravery Gem to help him. / Nazboo finds a kazoo that makes magic stronger when you play it, including Zeta's.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The Wild West Toy Train Show: Milli, Geo, and Bot can't wait to meet their friend Ethan, but a gust of wind has blown Ethan's ticket out of his hands all the way up to the top of Wild West Mountain!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Nazboo goes off to help a genie with his deliveries, but Zeta worries she's lost him and enlists the girls' help to find him. When the girls learn to cloud surf, Shine gets overexcited and tries to ride the biggest wave at Cloud Beach.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Dora's Super Soccer Showdown: Dora travels to Brazil to play in the Big Cup Soccer Tournament, and if her team can beat the Monsters, they'll win the big cup.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: Chicks in the City: The school has been taking care of six eggs and now they're hatching! Milli, Geo and Bot watch as six adorable baby chicks pop out of their eggs. But then it gets windy! Eek!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: It's snack time and Samantha's baby brother Tyler really wants his favourite - fruit and yogurt - but they're all out! So Milli, Geo, and Bot zoom to the supermarket.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: The girls help the Zeashell Genie make surprisefilled zeashells, but sneaky Uzma swaps the surprises inside with her own. The girls run into trouble when Zeta enlists a cute magic-sucking fish to suck up their wish magic.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s Darington’s birthday! Crusher uses a robot plate to try and steal the birthday cake, but his plan goes awry and the cake goes rocketing away. Will Blaze catch the runaway cake before Crusher and save the party?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken: The Big Red Chicken: Dora and Boots read about a chicken that's as big as a house and set off on an educational adventure to meet him.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Little ice sprites use Shimmer and Shine's palace for their games, turning it into a winter wonderland Samira offers Zeta the chance to be a genie again under one condition: she must grant Shimmer and Shine's wishes.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 619
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure!: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights with their friends Rocinante the horse and Dapple the donkey when suddenly they hear a cry for help.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dora and her cousin Diego are on their way to a big surprise. It's Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Leah's party food accidentally gets run over by Zac, Leah needs to figure out what else to bring fast. Leah asks her genies for more Pigs in a Blanket, but the genies give her real pigs wrapped in a blanket!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: The Umizoomi Zoo!: A cute and cuddly Purple Monkey is moving into The Umi City Zoo today. But when he falls into the Penguin exhibit, it's Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Surprise: It's Boots' birthday! Dora tells him that all his friends are waiting at her house to give Boots a big party.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Leah wishes to be a genie for the day, Zeta uses magic to have Leah grant her wishes. / When Zac thinks the girls are missing, he plays detective and goes on the search with Kaz.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: There's only one thing that scares dinosaurs - the sound of thunder! So when a big storm frightens them away, Team Umizoomi must find the missing dinosaurs and lead them back home.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 999
programme.desc: Dora's Pirate Adventure: Yo ho ho! Dora and Boots and all their friends are putting on a pirate show today for their mommies and daddies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The girls travel with Shaya to an island where they meet the Animal Genie, who looks after all animals. / Shimmer and Shine tell Leah the story of how they met Tala and Nahal, with help from the Animal Genie.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: Dora's helping her new friend, Pepe the Pig, learn all about his new school. Pepe's really excited, especially when he hears that if the class earns 3 gold stars today, they get a popcorn party!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When the magical rainbow water goes out of balance, Samira sends the girls through the waterfall to a new world – Rainbow Zahramay. There, they meet a Waterfall Genie who can help them bring balance to the water.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sticky Tape: Benny the Bull needs some Sticky Tape in a hurry. His hot air balloon is leaking, and floating toward Crocodile Lake! Dora and Boots rush off to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 995
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Mermaids: It's Clean-Up the Beach Day, as Dora and Boots are cleaning up garbage when they find a Singing Clam, who tells them the story of Mariana the Mermaid. Mariana lives in the Mermaid Kingdom at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Blaze transforms into a tow-truck, and, with the help of AJ and Gabby, sets off on a tow-tally awesome adventure to save Stripes.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dora in Wonderland: While Dora's kitties run through a magic mirror, Dora becomes Dora in Wonderland! Join her and Boots on a double-length adventure through the magical, mixed-up world of Wonderland!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines! When a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends beat Crusher! Part 1.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Everyone's getting ready for the big Thanksgiving Day parade and dinner, but the Pirate Piggies accidentally float away on Dora's boat float.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Blaze smells smoke at Axle City’s garage, he calmly and courageously leads his friends outside to safety. Axle City’s fire chief is impressed with Blaze’s courage and thinks maybe he has what it takes to be a fire fighter, too.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine attend a party at Samira's palace. Zeta crashes the party pretending to be Samira. Zeta uses a potion to swap Leah's voice with a bird's. Will Shimmer and Shine understand Leah's tweets?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lost and Found: Dora and Boots find a little baby blue bird who fell out of her nest.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After searching endlessly for Zac's missing dinosaur toy, Leah asks her genies to wish up a replacement and gets stuck with a real live Apatosaurus! Leah, Shimmer, and Shine have to figure out a way to fix this behemoth mistake.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: Geo and his friend Dylan find out that the ice cream truck is missing! Geo meets up with Milli and Bot, and they set out to find the missing truck and solve its problems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into ferociously fast jungle cats to race in the Animal Island Championship! But to win, they’ll have to beat Crusher disguised as a cheating cheetah. Can they claw their way to victory?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With her brave dog at her side, Dora races on her scooter to the Big River so they can rescue Boots.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures, and today he's ready for his first treasure adventure! We help Little Map draw pictures and play map games to find the treasure at Treasure Mountain!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Kittens in Mittens: Dora is reading a book of nursery rhymes to Abuela's kitty, Lucky. Lucky loves the one about the three little kittens who ring the bells on their mittens as they dance and sing!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A cute little Zenguin takes a wishing coin and leads the girls on a chase around their new boat. / The girls visit Imma, the Waterfall Genie, at her home for a pool party, not knowing that Zeta is close behind.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's doing magic tricks for us today! For his first trick, he turns Boots into a chicken! But when he's going to turn him back into a monkey, he lets out a big sneeze that sends the wand flying off into Magic Land where it breaks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dora, Emma and Kate help Gus the Bus take all of the instruments to the kids at Music School.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 218
programme.desc: The King of Numbers - Part 1: Join Milli, Geo, and Bot for their greatest adventure ever, as Team Umizoomi sets off on a journey to visit their friend, the King of Numbers, in his magical kingdom.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When Zeta's sister comes to visit, Zeta is shocked to discover that her once sorcerific sister is now a genie! When Samira sends the girls out on a fun quest, Zeta tricks them into finding a bunch of magical items for her instead.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: It’s the second ever Team Truck Challenge - a big race that pairs trucks together in racing teams. And this time Blaze's teammate is...Crusher?! Will Crusher be able to resist his cheating ways to win for the very first time?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 96
programme.desc: Pest Of The West: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 97
programme.desc: It's a battle of the restaurants in '20,000 Patties Under The Sea', and then in 'The Battle Of Bikini Bottom', Patrick and SpongeBob discover that they have very different views about cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 98
programme.desc: WhoBob WhatPants?: SpongeBob gets a bump on the bonce and can't remember who he is. His friends back in Bikini Bottom, who once told him to get lost, soon find they're missing him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 99
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally messes up Squidward's face in 'The Two Faces Of Squidward', and then in 'Spongehenge', SpongeBob's sponge brings all the jellyfish to the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Plankton replaces the Chum Bucket with a Roman coliseum (and togas!) in 'Spongicus', and then in 'Suctioncup Symphony', Squidward is sure to win a music contest - if SpongeBob and Patrick stay quiet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 104
programme.desc: When Squidward points out that SpongeBob is 'Not Normal', he resolves to change his ways. And then in 'Gone', SpongeBob wakes up to discover that everyone in Bikini Bottom is... gone!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 105
programme.desc: SpongeBob is injured at work in 'The Splinter', while in 'Slide Whistle Stooges', SpongeBob and Patrick are driving Squidward crazy with their new slide whistles.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Patrick decides it's time to start living life like Larry the Lobster in 'A Life In A Day', and then in 'Sun Bleached', SpongeBob tries to get a tan, with disappointing results.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Squidward becomes monstrously huge, which only pleases SpongeBob and Patrick, in 'Giant Squidward', and in 'No Nose Knows', Patrick notices that he has no nose. How does he smell? He doesn't. Yet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The Krabby Patty's secret ingredient is stolen and SpongeBob must find it in 'The Patty Caper', and then in 'Plankton's Regular', Plankton is surprised to have a regular customer who enjoys his food.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Squidward gets busted for speeding in his boat (which isn't a speedboat) and is sent back to boating school in 'Boating Buddies'. Then in 'The Krabby Kronicle', Mr Krabs sets up his own newspaper.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 110
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is messing up Pearl's preparations in 'The Slumber Party', and then in 'Grooming Gary', SpongeBob gives Gary a makeover, so that he can enter him in a pet show. But Gary's not so keen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 111
programme.desc: SpongeBob And The Big Wave: Our heroes find themselves stranded on a tropical island, inhabited by an enigmatic surfing guru named Jack Kahuna Laguna. Guest starring the voice of Johnny Depp.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 112
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes the richest Sponge in Bikini Bottom in 'Porous Pockets', and in 'Choir Boys', Squidward tries to avoid SpongeBob while on his way to an audition for the Bikini Bottom Men's Chorus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Mr Krabs enters the world of professional wrestling in 'Krusty Krushers', and then in 'The Card', SpongeBob is determined to get a super rare Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy trading card.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 114
programme.desc: SpongeBob is determined to find out everything there is to know about Vikings in 'Dear Vikings', and then in 'Ditchin', Patrick persuades SpongeBob to ditch class, but fun soon turns to guilt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Mr Krabs must pretend to be a pirate for a visiting relative in 'Grandpappy The Pirate', and in 'Cephalopod Lodge', SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally get Squidward expelled from a secret society.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 116
programme.desc: In 'Squidward's Visit', SpongeBob is desperate to have Squidward visit him at home, but Squidward says no, and the store is all out of square pants in 'To Squarepants or Not To Squarepants',

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 117
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must replace Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy in a 'Shuffleboarding' tournament, and then in 'Professor Squidward', Squidward is mistaken for his much more famous rival.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 118
programme.desc: SpongeBob must find a new home for some unexpected guests in 'Pet Or Pests', and then in 'Komputer Overload', Plankton decides that he's had enough of Karen, and tries to replace her with a new model.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 119
programme.desc: SpongeBob has to run the Krusty Krab for 15 whole minutes, but is led astray by Squidward, in 'Gullible Pants', and then in 'Overbooked', SpongeBob just doesn't have time to help all of his friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 120
programme.desc: Patrick wants a hat, but discovers that wearing a hat is not as easy as it looks in 'No Hat For Pat', and then in 'Toy Store Of Doom', SpongeBob and Patrick stay in a toy store after it closes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 121
programme.desc: A friendly day at the beach turns into all-out war in 'Sand Castles In The Sand', and then in 'Shell Shocked', an accident-prone SpongeBob damages Gary's shell, and must find a replacement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 122
programme.desc: Plankton discovers the secret of attracting customers in 'Chum Bucket Supreme', and then in 'Single Cell Anniversary', Karen gets Plankton a very special gift - but Plankton has to earn it!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 123
programme.desc: Truth Or Square: SpongeBob and friends think back to the early days of the Krusty Krab with some never-before-seen flashbacks and celebrity guests in this very special episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 124
programme.desc: SpongeBob and friends think back to the early days of the Krusty Krab with some never-before-seen flashbacks and celebrity guests in this very special episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm in 'Pineapple Fever', and then in 'Chum Caverns', Plankton creates an underground restaurant that rivals the Krusty Krab!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 126
programme.desc: It's King Neptune's birthday, and SpongeBob wants to make sure his friends and family are there, including his son, Triton. But Neptune and Triton don't get along...

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 997
programme.desc: It's the anniversary of the Krusty Krab! Mr. Krabs calls everyone over early to prepare for the big night. However, a mishap causes the team to get stuck in Krabs' freezer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Squidward becomes the star of his own TV show and Squidward tries to sabotage SpongeBob's big dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to find enough food to feed Pearl as she goes through her growth spurt and later, after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with help from SpongeBob. Later, SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorises him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it. SpongeBob goes with Mr. Krabs to the Cheapest Crab Convention.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts. Later, Squidward and SpongeBob have to share a locker.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Later, SpongeBob and Patrick watch their heroes fight bad guys in a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer break at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mr. Krab opens a Dinner Theater at the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother. Mr. Krabs uses Gary to find spare change.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A monster terrorises Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Madame Hagfish puts a hex on the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo confront the future of their relationship when she lands her dream role in a movie blockbuster that will film overseas for the next three years.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 121
programme.desc: Buck the Magic Rat: Kenzie saves a rat in the subway and the kids are grossed out. But it starts bringing them luck and they all use it to solve their problems. (S1, ep 21)

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 318
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie's school project tops the gaming charts as an online sensation! Rapper Double G finds out they used his song and comes to collect his share. Despite their differences, the group teams up to create Game Shakers!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: The Game Shakers have to figure out how to break the news to Dub that they broke his expensive new television.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Griffin films the guys' lives for a reality show.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A classroom competition to make the Palm Woods more environmentally-friendly turns disastrous.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 123
programme.desc: When Hudson releases false information about a secret level in a game, Game Shakers is besieged by angry, crazy fans. Babe goes on a date with Mason Kendal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: The Game Shakers set Hudson up with a let's play account to help promote their games, but things quickly get out of hand when Hudson puts on Dub's rocket boots for fun.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo tells them they have to stay in LA to record a three-song Christmas EP, and it looks like they'll be spending their first Christmas away from home.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: After Josh ruins Drake's chances at having a hit song in the Superbowl, the boys must find a way to make things right. Along for the ride are a crazy houseguest, a bride, and one really big shrimp.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Gustavo has to go away on business, he lets the guys house-sit his mansion. While the boys do their best to keep the house in pristine condition, they inevitably destroy everything inside that Gustavo values.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Its date night at the Palm Woods. James helps Carlos on his date with one of the Jennifers, Kendall joins Lucy’s dinner with her parents, and Logan takes a blind date out so he can spy on Camille's date with Jett.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Dirty Blob: After Trip accidentally destroys a copy of the Game Shakers' latest game, the kids must sneak into Dub's studio to retrieve a copy of the game from his tablet. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Party Crashers: Babe and Kenzie's plans to hang with cool guy Mason are ruined when Bunny and Ruthless crash a birthday party. Dub uses Hudson to make Trip jealous. (S1, ep 12)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Trip Steals the Jet: Feeling pressure to fit in with Trip's rich friends, Babe convinces Trip to 'borrow' Dub's jet for the night. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kendall, James, Logan and Carlos are hockey playing best friends from Minnesota, whose lives are turned upside down after mega-record producer discovers them and moves them to Los Angeles to make them into the next big boy band.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The whole gang has gathered at Drake and Josh's house before Drake's big concert, but thanks to Walter's poor weather predictions they end up stuck in the house due to severe rain.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When a video of Babe dancing to Dub's new music video goes viral, Dub challenges Babe to a dance battle to prove he's the better dancer.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Logan brings Carlos along to the MCAT test as his good luck charm, but when Carlos somehow gets a higher score, Logan questions his plans to become a doctor.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Josh gets a student teaching job in Miranda's classroom, and Drake potentially discovers his new drummer.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys want to go camping, but Gustavo nixes the idea because it’s dangerous. Instead they use their connections to camp on a sound stage, but things go awry as the guys try to show off their roughing it skills.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Josh's long time e-pal Yooka decides to visit from Yudonia, but a Yudonian "Friendship Ceremony" turns out to be a Yudonian wedding!

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Babe blows the entire Game Shakers ad budget on a high-tech bus bench, only to find out the bench is a magnet for low-lifes and weirdos.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: After an online story about Game Shakers snubs Kenzie, she and Babe get in a fight. Upset, Kenzie takes a job as a waitress at a coffee shop and Babe has to try and get her back to Game Shakers.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spending all their time together since moving to LA has given guys cabin fever, so they decide to spend some time apart.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Kenzie's dating app causes huge problems for Babe.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Kendall, James, Logan and Carlos are hockey playing best friends from Minnesota, whose lives are turned upside down after mega-record producer discovers them and moves them to Los Angeles to make them into the next big boy band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Gustavo gets a spiritual guru to help with his anger issues, but when the guru talks Gustavo into letting him run Rocque Records, the boys must do whatever it takes to get back control of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Kendall and Logan volunteer at a dog shelter and end up adopting 12 dogs, but a sneaky heath inspector is on to them. Carlos and Jennifer’s puppy love is sickening and it’s up to James and the other Jennifers to rescue them.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The guys get to hang out at Griffin’s beach house for day and invite the Palm Woods kids along. Carlos and Logan hunt for buried treasure, and James falls for a pretty girl who he suspects is a mermaid.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Helen enlists the aide of Drake and Josh after laser eye surgery leaves her temporarily blinded. When they lose Helen after taking advantage of her many at-home amenities, they are forced to ask themselves, who's the blind one in this situation?

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie try to locate a cute boy who waved to Kenzie on the subway while Hudson and Trip become obsessed with a model doll house.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh decide to turn the tables and prank little Megan, she has the whole family believing that aliens are coming.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: James continues his pursuit of Lucy and buys a motorcycle in order to impress her, but he doesn’t know how to drive it. Kendall teaches Jo how to drive stick-shift, and Carlos & Logan can’t relinquish a childhood treasure.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kendall and Logan must take care of Rocque Records' newest artist – an out-of-it rock legend until his induction into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame that night. James and Carlos are stuck babysitting Katie.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: After the boys get in trouble for using Fake ID's Audrey and Walter fear they will fall to a life of crime and sign them up for a "Steered Straight" program, but things start skidding out-of-control when a real criminal befriends them

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake convinces Josh that in order to become cooler he must try out for the football team.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh mistakenly assume that Walter's suspicious behavior means that he is having an affair, they decide to take matters into their own hands, but ultimately end up cheating only themselves.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The kids at the Palm Woods are organizing their first school dance and the boys of Big Time Rush have secured the perfect location, Gustavo's recording studio.
